modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to access AI partner models in Adobe Creative Cloud apps.

full_description_text:
- I am trying to use AI partner models in Photoshop and other Adobe Creative Cloud apps.  
- I received an error message stating that my system administrator is not allowing access to this feature.  
- I would like to know what generative AI functions are available in Creative Cloud.
short_description: Unable to access AI partner models in Adobe Creative Cloud apps.
description:

- I received an error message stating that my system administrator is not allowing access to this feature.  
- I would like to know what generative AI functions are available in Creative Cloud.
